text_zh: 我们需要更多性感的照片
reply_original: I'm glad you're enjoying the app! Regarding your request, we must follow Google Play policies, so we cannot provide explicit or nude content. However, we are constantly updating our character gallery with high-quality, stylish images! If you have specific suggestions for styles, feel free to email us at support@fantachat.ai.
reply_zh: 很高兴你喜欢这款应用！关于你的请求，我们必须遵守 Google Play 的政策，因此无法提供露骨或裸露的内容。不过，我们正在不断更新角色库，增加高质量且时尚的图片！如果你对风格有具体的建议，欢迎随时发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai 联系我们。
